name: 18-injection-stored-softcode-is-data
description: Softcode stored in an attribute must be inert on a raw read: obj.getAttr returns the TEXT of the attribute, it is not re-evaluated. PAYLOAD contains a call that would emit 'pwned' if evaluated; reading it must yield the literal source string and never the effect. (Deliberate re-evaluation exists only via the explicit ctl.eval / obj.callAttr path.)
